_doc: Registry of source score documents (the music PDFs the transcriptions and glyph crops come from). The PDF binaries live in app/core/sources/<file> and are GITIGNORED (large, public-domain scans); this registry and the page renders are version-controlled. A source links to the piece(s) transcribed from it; via app/core/glyph_samples.json each source's pages further link to the glyph crops and the actual note tokens taken from them. This is the top of the relationship chain: source PDF -> page -> bar -> note token / glyph crop.

sources.name: Piano Sonata No. 16 in C major, K. 545
